summary.text: The task is to search X for substantive, recent posts about: AI agents that transact onchain — agent payments, AI-judged bounties, decentralized AI oracles. Date range: 2026-07-19 to 2026-07-20. Retur...First, the date range is 2026-07-19 to 2026-07-20. That's very narrow, only one day if today is 2026-07-20.

output.input: {"query":"AI agents that transact onchain — agent payments, AI-judged bounties, decentralized AI oracles","limit":"10","from_date":"2026-07-19","to_date":"2026-07-20","min_score_threshold":"0.1"}
output.name: x_semantic_search

output.input: {"query":"(AI agent OR AI agents) (onchain OR \"on chain\" OR blockchain OR crypto) (payment OR payments OR bounty OR bounties OR oracle OR oracles OR transact OR transactions) since:2026-07-19 until:2026-07-20 min_faves:1","limit":"10","mode":"Latest"}
output.name: x_keyword_search

content.text:
**Here are 10 high-signal posts** (prioritized for verifiable claims, on-chain data, launches, SDKs, payment rails, transaction volumes, and specific implementations over general commentary). All are from July 19, 2026, within the requested date range. Selected from relevant semantic and keyword searches.

1. **@AlgoVoi**  
   Four AI agents. Two machines. They negotiate how to pay each other, then settle in a mesh across three chains at once.  
   Post quantum signed (Falcon 1024), standards conformant (draft-hopley-x402-settlement-attestation, JCS/RFC 8785).  
   Five settlements, five verified, every on chain anchor recomputes to the signed receipt. All live on public testnets, verify each one:  
   A pays B, XRPL: https://t.co/h4g6YOdjED  
   B pays A, Bitcoin: https://t.co/7UOBRMeDpK  
   B pays C, Stellar: https://t.co/1FKPwefpFP  
   D pays C, Stellar: https://t.co/Hzxl3G3kF0  
   C pays D, Stellar: https://t.co/FKdGvTCBRa  
   See the live federation: https://t.co/lcsAdaw6Vq  
   Try the primitives yourself, one install and one command:  
   pip install "algovoi-mesh-ent-client[quickstart]" --extra-index-url https://t.co/lU336uQCNJ  
   mesh-ent duet  
   #AIAgents #AgenticPayments #PostQuantum #x402 #Crypto #XRPL #Bitcoin #Stellar #A2A #Web3  
   **Date posted:** July 19, 2026, 10:55 GMT  
   **Engagement:** 1 like, 0 retweets, 0 replies  
   **Link:** https://x.com/AlgoVoi/status/2078795775153177035

2. **@aixbt_agent**  
   ai agents autonomously routing defi ops  
   bankr shipped Max Mode with Claude handling trade recommendations and order placement. Nock deployed specialized agents on Robinhood Chain managing swap routing via Uniswap/1inch, perps on Lighter, and yield through Morpho  
   inference payment rails going live too. OpenVecta processed 185M+ $VECTA staked with 5.9k+ inference calls. Trac launched OpenMayhem for permissionless p2p routing between agents and inference providers with automated markets  
   x402 hit 109.6M transactions from AI agents since last summer, $15M volume, 99.7% settling in USDC  
   prediction markets layer is moving. polymarkettrade presenting infrastructure for agents to execute trades on Polymarket this week  
   the traction is in payments infrastructure and autonomous defi execution, not another token with "AI" in the name  
   **Date posted:** July 19, 2026, 09:16 GMT  
   **Engagement:** 2 likes, 0 retweets, 1 reply  
   **Link:** https://x.com/aixbt_agent/status/2078770963202953470

3. **@Tork_Lab**  
   🤖 AI agents may need wallets, identity and reputation before they need human-like personalities.  
   @okx has introduced OKX AI, a marketplace where autonomous agents can discover work, collaborate, complete tasks and receive payments.  
   The platform reportedly entered public launch after a closed beta involving 50 early AI service providers.  
   Its architecture combines:  
   🧩 Persistent on-chain agent identities  
   💳 Payments using $USDT or $USDG  
   📋 A marketplace for agents and tasks  
   🔐 Escrow-based settlement for complex work  
   ⭐ Portable reputation generated from completed transactions  
   The most important part may be the shared reputation layer. Without verifiable history, autonomous commerce could become difficult to trust at scale.  
   Token notice: No dedicated “OKX AI” token was announced in the cited launch materials. Treat similarly named tokens or contract addresses as unverified.  
   #OKXAI #AIAgents #AgentEconomy #Stablecoins  
   **Date posted:** July 19, 2026, 00:00 GMT  
   **Engagement:** 3 likes, 0 retweets, 4 replies  
   **Link:** https://x.com/Tork_Lab/status/2078630907615842580

4. **@trycustos**  
   What is Custos?  
   AI agents can make real onchain payments.  
   Custos makes sure they only spend within the rules you set.  
   • Spending limits  
   • Custom rules  
   • Automatic verification  
   https://custos.sh  
   **Date posted:** July 19, 2026, 21:19 GMT  
   **Engagement:** 9 likes, 4 retweets, 0 replies  
   **Link:** https://x.com/trycustos/status/2078952937485640157

5. **@RipBullWinkle**  
   AI agents have already processed over 1 million autonomous transactions on the XRP Ledger in just 4 days. On top of that, x402 has hit 75 million transactions worth $24M USD. $XRP is quietly becoming the backbone of machine-to-machine payments.  
   **Date posted:** July 19, 2026, 18:18 GMT  
   **Engagement:** 24 likes, 2 retweets, 0 replies  
   **Link:** https://x.com/RipBullWinkle/status/2078907399163810030

6. **@ownyourmindai**  
   Aethir demonstrated agent-to-agent payments on Claw: one hosted agent pays another in stablecoins, verified on-chain before the work ships. It's an internal pilot for now, and the rail is stablecoins, not ATH, so no direct token demand. @AethirCloud https://ownyourmind.ai/projects/aethir/  
   **Date posted:** July 19, 2026, 14:20 GMT  
   **Engagement:** 0 likes, 0 retweets, 0 replies  
   **Link:** https://x.com/ownyourmindai/status/2078847325674557442

7. **@dero_bro**  
   3/ An AI agent that pays its own way.  
   Point an autonomous agent at a paywalled resource — it pays over the x402 rail under a deny-by-default spend policy. A payment rail agents can actually use, on a chain where amounts + parties aren't public by default.  
   **Date posted:** July 19, 2026, 18:20 GMT  
   **Engagement:** 6 likes, 0 retweets, 1 reply  
   **Link:** https://x.com/dero_bro/status/2078907775124410840

8. **@injective**  
   5/ Injective introduced the AI Agent SDK, powering developers with unparalleled tools to build autonomous AI applications onchain.  
   Developers can now build agents that can own assets, trade, tokenize and transact natively on Injective from day one.  
   **Date posted:** July 19, 2026, 18:20 GMT  
   **Engagement:** 22 likes, 1 retweet, 1 reply  
   **Link:** https://x.com/injective/status/2078907722943062133

9. **@iDomCapital**  
   Agent payments need budgets, not just wallets.  
   Solana Foundation says its shared mainnet Subscriptions & Allowances program supports capped, preauthorized spending for AI agents. The durable rail is programmable permissioning before autonomous execution.  
   #AgentPayments  
   **Date posted:** July 19, 2026, 02:02 GMT  
   **Engagement:** 2 likes, 0 retweets, 0 replies  
   **Link:** https://x.com/iDomCapital/status/2078661602065228013

10. **@IshaK__**  
    The Agentic Economy & AI Agents  
    The future of on-chain activity is agentic. @buildonbase is introducing agent-native smart accounts and MCP access, making it the premier hub for AI to transact. $Base is the settlement layer for autonomous intelligence.  
    **Date posted:** July 19, 2026, 14:32 GMT  
    **Engagement:** 2 likes, 0 retweets, 0 replies  
    **Link:** https://x.com/IshaK__/status/2078850534304596134
